paper.title: Deepening our collaboration with the U.S. Department of Energy
paper.abstract: OpenAI and the U.S. Department of Energy have signed a memorandum of understanding to deepen collaboration on AI and advanced computing in support of scientific discovery. The agreement builds on ongoing work with national laboratories and helps establish a framework for applying AI to high-impact research across the DOE ecosystem.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
